ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the category */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the category */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour */,
  "hour_name" TEXT /* Name of the hour (00:00, 01:00, etc.) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the hour is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the hour */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the hour */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row of crime data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime category */,
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hour */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the crime data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "assault" INTEGER /* Number of assaults */,
  "burglary" INTEGER /* Number of burglaries */,
  "disorderly_conduct" INTEGER /* Number of disorderly conduct incidents */,
  "driving_under_influence" INTEGER /* Number of driving under the influence incidents */,
  "drug_narcotic" INTEGER /* Number of drug/narcotic incidents */,
  "drunkenness" INTEGER /* Number of drunkenness incidents */,
  "larceny_theft" INTEGER /* Number of larceny/theft incidents */,
  "prostitution" INTEGER /* Number of prostitution incidents */,
  "robbery" INTEGER /* Number of robberies */,
  "stolen_property" INTEGER /* Number of stolen property incidents */,
  "trespass" INTEGER /* Number of trespass incidents */,
  "vandalism" INTEGER /* Number of vandalism incidents */,
  "vehicle_theft" INTEGER /* Number of vehicle theft incidents */,
  "weapon_laws" INTEGER /* Number of weapon laws violations */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the data */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the data */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_hour_id FOREIGN KEY ("hour_id") REFERENCES hours ("hour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime category */,
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hour */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the crime report */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "suspect_details" TEXT /* Details about the suspect */,
  "victim_details" TEXT /* Details about the victim */,
  "evidence_details" TEXT /* Details about the evidence */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_hour_id FOREIGN KEY ("hour_id") REFERENCES hours ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, officer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log entry is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the log entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the log entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high crime rate, unusual pattern) */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the alert */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the alert */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being tracked */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data entry */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the data entry */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the crime count */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the historical data entry is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the historical data entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the historical data entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the historical data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the location */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the location */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
